narrative:
Porter Twp township has 1,784 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.0 percentage points.
